**What you want to do** (the user scenario, not the implementation):

**Why the current behavior blocks you:**

**Scope check** — please read CONTRIBUTING.md first. Features out of scope (no discussion needed):
- Linux/Windows ports
- Runtime dependencies
- `--css` custom themes
- AG-UI protocol support
- Replacements for Electron/Tauri/Wails
